    "customfield_10019": "2|hzqwtj:000086",
    "updated": "2026-04-01T09:50:05.815+0200",
    "timeoriginalestimate": null,
    "description": "We are integrating AI into the performance review process. The AI will read the review data, including goals, metrics, past reviews, and manager/employee comments, and give a clear, concise summary of performance insights.   \nPrototype: <custom data-type=\"smartlink\" data-id=\"id-0\">https://ai-insights-employee-dxqt.bolt.host/</custom> \n\n---\n\n#### AC1 – UI Integration\n\nOn the Performance Review page, under Overall Results, display an AI Insights button.\n\nClicking the button opens a flyout panel.\n\nFlyout tabs\n\n* Summary\n* Focus\n* Compare Reviews\n* HR Actions\n\n---\n\n#### AC2 – Summary Tab\n\nBehavior\n\nDisplay 1–2 AI-generated sentences automatically when the review is opened.\n\nThe summary should combine:\n\n* overall performance score\n* overall potential score\n* comments / manager feedback if available\n\nExample:\n\nThe employee shows strong performance consistency with good alignment between self and manager feedback, while potential remains strong for future growth.\n\nFallback:\n\n> Summary currently unavailable.\n\n---\n\n#### AC3 – Focus Tab\n\nShow recommended development focus areas based on:\n\n* comments\n* lower score areas\n* repeated manager concerns\n\nFallback:\n\n> Focus areas currently unavailable.\n\n---\n\n#### AC4 – Compare Reviews Tab (FINAL AGREED)\n\nScope\n\nCompare Overall Scores by review source within the same cycle only\n\nNo competency comparison  \nNo question-level comparison  \nNo historical cycle comparison\n\n---\n\nCompared values\n\nDisplay two score sections:\n\n* Performance\n* Potential\n\nFor each section show available review source scores:\n\n* Self\n* Manager\n* Peer\n* Direct Report\n\nOnly display sources that exist.\n\n---\n\nUI\n\nUse bar score visualization\n\nExample:\n\nPerformance\n\n* Self → blue bar\n* Manager → green bar\n* Peer → orange bar\n* Direct Report → purple bar\n\nPotential\n\n* Self → blue bar\n* Manager → green bar\n* Peer → orange bar\n* Direct Report → purple bar\n\nThis keeps the comparison visually clear.\n\n---\n\nComparison logic\n\nCalculate differences between available overall scores:\n\n* Self vs Manager\n* Self vs Peer\n* Manager vs Peer\n* Manager vs Direct Report\n\n---\n\nAlignment thresholds\n\nFor 1–5 scale:\n\n* 🟢 High Alignment → ≤ 0.2\n* 🟡 Moderate → 0.3–0.5\n* 🔴 Low → > 0.5\n\nShow alignment badge next to each score group.\n\n---\n\nAI summary expectation\n\nAI should not repeat the numeric scores.\n\nIts purpose is to interpret the score differences and comments.\n\nExamples:\n\n> There is strong alignment between self and manager performance ratings.\n\n> Self-rating is slightly higher than manager feedback, indicating a minor perception gap.\n\n> Potential ratings remain consistently high across all review sources.\n\nValue of AI:\n\n* explain alignment\n* explain score gaps\n* summarize comment themes\n* help HR / managers interpret the meaning quickly\n\n---\n\nPartial data handling\n\nIf some review source is missing:\n\n* skip it\n* compare only available sources\n\nExample:  \nIf peer review is missing, compare Self vs Manager only.\n\nFallback:\n\n> Compare reviews data is currently unavailable.\n\n---\n\n#### AC5 – HR Actions Tab\n\nGenerate HR-safe recommendations based on:\n\n* score alignment\n* low manager score\n* repeated comment themes\n* downward trend if available\n\nFallback:\n\n> HR actions currently unavailable.",
    "customfield_10010": null,

    "timeoriginalestimate": null,
    "description": "We are integrating AI into the performance review process. The AI will read the review data, including goals, metrics, past reviews, and manager/employee comments, and give a clear, concise summary of performance insights.   \nPrototype: <custom data-type=\"smartlink\" data-id=\"id-0\">https://ai-insights-employee-dxqt.bolt.host/</custom> \n\n---\n\n#### AC1 – UI Integration\n\nOn the Performance Review page, under Overall Results, display an AI Insights button.\n\nClicking the button opens a flyout panel.\n\nFlyout tabs\n\n* Summary\n* Focus\n* Compare Reviews\n* HR Actions\n\n---\n\n#### AC2 – Summary Tab\n\nBehavior\n\nDisplay 1–2 AI-generated sentences automatically when the review is opened.\n\nThe summary should combine:\n\n* overall performance score\n* overall potential score\n* comments / manager feedback if available\n\nExample:\n\nThe employee shows strong performance consistency with good alignment between self and manager feedback, while potential remains strong for future growth.\n\nFallback:\n\n> Summary currently unavailable.\n\n---\n\n#### AC3 – Focus Tab\n\nShow recommended development focus areas based on:\n\n* comments\n* lower score areas\n* repeated manager concerns\n\nFallback:\n\n> Focus areas currently unavailable.\n\n---\n\n#### AC4 – Compare Reviews Tab (FINAL AGREED)\n\nScope\n\nCompare Overall Scores by review source within the same cycle only\n\nNo competency comparison  \nNo question-level comparison  \nNo historical cycle comparison\n\n---\n\nCompared values\n\nDisplay two score sections:\n\n* Performance\n* Potential\n\nFor each section show available review source scores:\n\n* Self\n* Manager\n* Peer\n* Direct Report\n\nOnly display sources that exist.\n\n---\n\nUI\n\nUse bar score visualization\n\nExample:\n\nPerformance\n\n* Self → blue bar\n* Manager → green bar\n* Peer → orange bar\n* Direct Report → purple bar\n\nPotential\n\n* Self → blue bar\n* Manager → green bar\n* Peer → orange bar\n* Direct Report → purple bar\n\nThis keeps the comparison visually clear.\n\n---\n\nComparison logic\n\nCalculate differences between available overall scores:\n\n* Self vs Manager\n* Self vs Peer\n* Manager vs Peer\n* Manager vs Direct Report\n\n---\n\nAlignment thresholds\n\nFor 1–5 scale:\n\n* 🟢 High Alignment → ≤ 0.2\n* 🟡 Moderate → 0.3–0.5\n* 🔴 Low → > 0.5\n\nShow alignment badge next to each score group.\n\n---\n\nAI summary expectation\n\nAI should not repeat the numeric scores.\n\nIts purpose is to interpret the score differences and comments.\n\nExamples:\n\n> There is strong alignment between self and manager performance ratings.\n\n> Self-rating is slightly higher than manager feedback, indicating a minor perception gap.\n\n> Potential ratings remain consistently high across all review sources.\n\nValue of AI:\n\n* explain alignment\n* explain score gaps\n* summarize comment themes\n* help HR / managers interpret the meaning quickly\n\n---\n\nPartial data handling\n\nIf some review source is missing:\n\n* skip it\n* compare only available sources\n\nExample:  \nIf peer review is missing, compare Self vs Manager only.\n\nFallback:\n\n> Compare reviews data is currently unavailable.\n\n---\n\n#### AC5 – HR Actions Tab\n\nGenerate HR-safe recommendations based on:\n\n* score alignment\n* low manager score\n* repeated comment themes\n* downward trend if available\n\nFallback:\n\n> HR actions currently unavailable.",

parts.text: Now I have all the issue data, I'll synthesize and present a clear analysis covering the key details, acceptance criteria, technical considerations, and current status.

## CHR-48347 Analysis: Perform | Reviews | AI Insights

### Overview
**Type:** Story | **Status:** Dev & QA Review | **Priority:** Standard (P2)  
**Assignee:** Quan Vu Nhat | **Reporter:** Iva Jelavić  
**Components:** AI, Perform | **Labels:** MobileImpact  
**Sprint:** CHR 6.54 (Active) — ends Apr 22, 2026  
**Prototype:** [AI Insights Prototype](https://ai-insights-employee-dqt.bolt.host/)

---

### Feature Summary
Integrate AI into the performance review process to provide automated insights from review data (goals, metrics, past reviews, manager/employee comments).

---

### Acceptance Criteria Breakdown

| AC | Tab | Key Requirements |
|----|-----|-----------------|
| **AC1** | UI Integration | AI Insights button under Overall Results → opens flyout panel with 4 tabs |
| **AC2** | Summary | 1-2 auto-generated sentences combining performance score, potential score, and feedback. Fallback message required. |
| **AC3** | Focus | Recommended development areas from comments, low scores, repeated manager concerns. Fallback required. |
| **AC4** | Compare Reviews | **Most detailed AC.** Bar score visualization comparing Performance & Potential across sources (Self/Manager/Peer/Direct Report). Alignment thresholds (🟢≤0.2, 🟡0.3-0.5, 🔴>0.5). AI interprets gaps, doesn't repeat scores. Partial data handling. |
| **AC5** | HR Actions | HR-safe recommendations based on alignment, low scores, comment themes, trends. Fallback required. |

---

### Technical Considerations

1. **Compare Reviews Tab (AC4) — Key Decisions:**
   - Same cycle comparison only (no historical)
   - Overall scores only (no competency/question-level)
   - 1-5 scale with color-coded alignment badges
   - Missing sources are skipped gracefully

2. **Data Sources Needed:**
   - Performance & Potential scores by reviewer type
   - Manager/employee comments
   - Review cycle metadata

3. **AI Prompt Requirements:**
   - Summary: synthesize scores + feedback into 1-2 sentences
   - Focus: extract development areas from patterns
   - Compare: interpret score gaps, not repeat numbers
   - HR Actions: generate safe, actionable recommendations

4. **Mobile Impact** — tagged `MobileImpact`, so flyout must be responsive

---

### Current State
- No comments, no subtasks, no linked issues
- No time tracking logged
- No resolution or fix versions set
- In "Dev & QA Review" since Feb 11, 2026

Would you like me to proceed with implementation planning, create test cases, or delegate this to a specialized agent?
